briefs.title: BC Pharmacare Adds Plan NP, Removes Insulin Pricing Exception, Bans Extra Billing from March 1
briefs.summary: Effective March 1, 2026, BC amends its pharmaceutical regulations to establish a new drug plan (Plan NP) for all medicare beneficiaries, remove the insulin exemption from price controls, and prohibit providers from charging beneficiaries for fully covered drugs.
briefs.action_required: Ensure your pharmacy billing systems and fee schedules comply with the no-extra-charge rule and updated drug pricing rules by March 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Reg. 6/2026 pharmaceutical amendments take effect — Plan NP, insulin pricing, billing rules
